info.name: Wrectifai API
info.description: Comprehensive Postman Collection for the Wrectifai REST API endpoints, covering authentication, profiles, user services, garage operations, vehicles, diagnosis, marketplace, payments, and admin actions.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Endpoints related to user registration, login, social auth, logout, and session lifecycle.

request.description: Send a registration OTP verification code to a phone number. Standard roles are 'user', 'garage', 'vendor', 'admin'.
Verify the registration OTP code. Upon successful verification, the user is registered, cookies are set, and access details are returned.
Send a login OTP challenge to an existing phone number.
Verify the login OTP code and log in the user, returning active session and setting secure HTTP-Only cookies.

variable.description: Google or Apple social authentication provider

request.description: Register or log in via third-party OAuth provider identifiers.
Refreshes session credentials. Expects cookie `wrect_rt` or matching body.
Revokes tokens and clears session cookies.
Checks the authenticated state and returns simple user identification.

item.name: Users
item.description: User specific operations including profile retrieval, settings, ticket creations, and quotes.

request.description: Returns current user details.
Returns customer dashboard statistics.
Returns garage dashboard basic text response.
Returns vendor dashboard basic text response.
Returns admin dashboard basic text response.
Fetches detailed user profile data.

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "John Doe Modified",
  "email": "john.doe@example.com",
  "avatarUrl": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg",
  "bio": "Automotive enthusiast",
  "addressLine": "123 Main St",
  "city": "Metropolis",
  "state": "NY",
  "postalCode": "10001",
  "notificationPreferences": {
    "bookings": true,
    "reminders": false,
    "offers": true
  }
}

request.description: Updates core fields on the user account and user profile record.
Returns user preference configurations.
Sets preference flags inside user settings payload.
List all complaints or helpdesk tickets filed by this user.
Filing a support request ticket.
Lists issue requests with full child details of all associated garage quotes.

variable.description: UUID of the quote you choose to accept

request.description: Accepts a garage quote, marks all other quotes for this issue as rejected, and updates issue status.

item.name: Vehicles
item.description: Vehicles profile management and repair history search APIs.

query.description: Filter by make, model, trim, vin, plate number

request.description: Lists all user vehicles.
Inserts a new vehicle record under user ownership.

variable.description: UUID of the vehicle to modify

request.description: Edits field definitions on the vehicle profile.
Updates this vehicle to be default and disables other user vehicles from default status.
Removes a vehicle and sets another remaining vehicle as default if this was active.
Gets past services records lists associated with this vehicle.
Parses fields suggesting make, model, year, VIN and plate details using regex search models.

item.name: Diagnosis
item.description: Interactive smart car issue assessment and AI queries.

body.raw:
{
  "prompt": "My engine makes a clicking sound when starting.",
  "firstAnswer": "It clicks fast but the motor doesn't spin over.",
  "category": "electrical",
  "mode": "diagnosis",
  "maxQuestions": 3
}

request.description: Generates diagnosis logic follow-up questions using AI provider algorithms.
Stores user symptoms and processes draft estimation range and possible urgency ratings.

item.name: Marketplace
item.description: Issue posting, quoting, matching, bookings and parts store integrations.

request.description: Submit a full comprehensive customer service request flow intake.
Submit a simple direct vehicle issue request.
Get a list of issues submitted by the authenticated user.
Fetch detailed information for a single issue.
Makes the user request visible to garages in the local network database to start quoting.
Returns quotes offered by garages matching this issue ID.
Accepts a quote and auto-schedules a booking slot.
Cancels selected/pending states.
Lists all appointment booking cards.
Re-schedules booking slot times.
Retrieves active spare parts inventory.
Retrieves parts purchasing history.
Buys parts directly from store inventory.

item.name: Garage Console
item.description: Services specific to garage dashboard operators.

request.description: Returns counts of bookings, quotes sent, total revenues, and approval states.
Returns general issue requests seeking bids.
Post a quote containing labor estimation and parts cost metrics.
View patient symptoms log and vehicle make fields.
Lists quote bids submitted for comparison parameters.
Fetch scheduled appointments linked to this garage.
List custom standard services offered by this garage.
Add service template mapping details.
Modifies catalog descriptions.
Removes from the catalog list database.
Returns operational shifts schedule mapping.
Gets shop addresses, business hours, and certifications.

body.raw:
{
  "garageName": "Speedy Auto Repair Clinic",
  "email": "contact@speedyrepairs.com",
  "phone": "+15559876543",
  "address": "456 Garage Ln, Metropolis, NY, 10002",
  "businessHours": "Mon-Fri 8am-6pm",
  "description": "State-of-the-art vehicle diagnosis and engine repair station.",
  "specializations": ["Brakes", "Tuning", "AC Repair"],
  "certifications": ["ASE Certified"]
}

request.description: Saves updated profile settings.

item.name: Payments
item.description: Transactions history, summary metrics, and intent setups.

request.description: Lists paid transaction cards.
Returns cumulative spends values.
Creates a secure transaction session.
Fetch invoice settings metadata.
Simulates payment gateway feedback updating invoice transactions to 'paid'.

item.name: Admin Portal
item.description: Admin privileges queries (User toggles, bookings list, quotes index, global verification filters).

request.description: Returns full lists of registered user entries.
Suspend, freeze, or activate user credentials.
Global service bookings tracker index.
Global quote index list tracker.
Global transaction logs auditor ledger.
Retrieves support tickets index with user data.
Lists garages waiting for profile reviews.
Approves or rejects a garage listing.

item.name: Metadata & Utilities
item.description: Health checks, application constants, UI dynamic contents lists.

request.description: Returns localized translations or screen definitions.
Gets tenant name, default themes, dynamic logo URLs settings config.
Returns simple uptime statistics checking.
